resources:
MGSR Team Player recruitment made simple
Our Roster Home Dashboard Releases Returnee Contacts Shortlist Requests
Welcome Back Sign in to continue Login Signing in… Invalid email or password. Please try again. Please enter a valid email address Your email address Your password MGSR Team logo Toggle password visibility Switch language
Search players or note by keyword
Our Roster Total Add Player Clear All GK DEF MID FWD Sort options Newest Value Name Age Reset Newest First By Market Value By Name By Age Free Agents Contract Expiring With Mandate My Players Only Loan Players Only Without Registered Agent %d Contracts Expiring Soon Action needed before contract ends %d Players with Mandate Players with active mandate Mandate: %s Free Agent On loan On loan from %s On loan from yrs %s yrs No players found Add players to your roster or clear filters to see your full list. Reset Filters Clear all Filters By Position By Agent By Contract Without club Contract finishing soon With notes Left foot Right foot Both feet Contract Expiring Contract not available Done Go back Search players Market value increased Market value decreased
Shortlist Saved profiles from Releases & Returnees — add to agency when ready Players to follow in the coming weeks Profiles to follow in the near future Player Info View and manage player details Add Player Player requests from clubs by position %d matching player %d matching players Players for this request Find players online Players from the market Searching players… No matching players found online %d players found No roster players match this request Add player This Week Could not load player. They may already be in your roster. yrs Shortlisted Add to agency Open TM Remove Remove this player from your shortlist? No players in shortlist Add players from Releases or Returnees to save them for later. When ready, add them to your agency. Browse Releases Browse Returnees Added to shortlist Added today Added yesterday Added %d days ago Added 1 week ago Added %d weeks ago Added %d months ago Added by %1$s %d notes Tap to add a note Add Note Add Note Edit Note Edit Delete Save Write your note here… %d days ago
Search by name, club or country All Search
Account not allowed
MGSR Team Alerts Contract reminders, new releases and agency updates Contract reminders Contract expiring soon %d player(s) have contracts expiring in the next 5 months Without club alerts Player(s) without club %d player(s) became without club
Club Transfer %1$s moved from %2$s to %3$s Free Agent Alert %1$s is now without a club (was at %2$s) Market Value Change %1$s: %2$s → %3$s New Free Agent %1$s released from his club — maybe you want to approach him. %1$s released from his club — maybe you want to approach him. Not in our database. Mandate Expired %1$s\'s mandate has expired. Open Transfermarkt Add to Shortlist
New Task Assigned %1$s assigned you: %2$s You have a new task: %1$s Task Reminder "%1$s" is due today "%1$s" is due tomorrow "%1$s" is due in %2$s days
Good Morning Good Afternoon Good Evening Agent
Men Women Youth Platform
Our Squad Add Player Add Player Search by name (e.g. Lauren James) Search SoccerDonna or add manually SoccerDonna · FMInside Or add manually Paste SoccerDonna URL Load from URL Full Name * Positions Club Age Nationality Market Value SoccerDonna URL Profile Image URL Player Phone Agent Phone Notes Save Player Women\'s Football Links Search player by name %s yrs GK DEF MID FWD SoccerDonna Profile FMInside Profile Free Agent Player added
Youth Players Add Youth Player Add Youth Player Search youth players… Enter player name to add IFA · football.org.il Full Name (English) Full Name (Hebrew) Positions Club Academy / Division Date of Birth Age Group Nationality Profile Image URL IFA Profile URL Player Phone Player Email Parent / Guardian Parent Name Relationship Parent Phone Parent Email Notes Save Player Import from contacts Youth Details IFA Profile IFA Statistics Matches Goals Assists Parent / Guardian Father Mother Guardian Agent Name Phone Email Hebrew Name
Roster Mandate Free Requests
Our Roster Shortlist Releases Returnees Contacts Requests Contract Finisher - Summer Contract Finisher - Winter Shadow Teams
Shadow Teams View all agents\' teams View and edit your shadow team No shadow teams yet Player not found You Formation Select player Select player for %1$s Search player… Cancel Change player Remove View profile No players in roster
Contract Finisher Contracts expiring in %1$s window Contracts expiring towards Summer window Contracts expiring towards Winter window Loading… %1$d players Loading more… Retry Release date - %1$s No contract finishers found in this range No players match your filters Clear filters Apply Filters 18-21 22-25 26-29 30+ All €150K–500K €500K–1M €1M–2M €2M–3M Value Position Foot Age Region
Recent Updates All Value Transfers Notes Show All Show Less No recent updates yet.\nUpdates will appear here after the daily sync. Market Value Update Club Change Detected Became Free Agent New Free Agent (Releases) Not in our database Mandate Expired Mandate Uploaded %1$s uploaded mandate for %2$s Marked by %1$s Expires %1$s Mandate switched on Mandate switched off %1$s switched mandate for %2$s Contract Expiring New Note Note Deleted %1$s deleted a note on %2$s Player Added Player Deleted This player was deleted from the database Added to Shortlist Removed from Shortlist Removed by %1$s Added by %1$s New Request Request Deleted Deleted by %1$s Update Value changed from %1$s to %2$s No value Moved from %1$s to %2$s Released from %1$s %1$s added a note on %2$s Player Offered Offered to %1$s Offered by %1$s
Just now %1$dm ago %1$dh ago %1$dd ago
My Dashboard Players Mandate Free Expiring Coverage Tasks Done Upcoming Tasks View All My Players My Athletes
The Scouting Command Center
Empowering the game Athletes Represented Available Inquiries Our Athletes Watchlist Connections Club Inquiries Goals & Tasks My Command Center Athletes Represented Available Expiring Completed Upcoming Goals View All Activity Feed No recent activity — time to make moves! 💪
Became Free Agent New Free Agent (Releases) Player Added Player Deleted Player Offered Added to Shortlist Removed from Shortlist Released from %1$s Moved from %1$s to %2$s Added by %1$s Deleted by %1$s Removed by %1$s Offered to %1$s Offered by %1$s This player was deleted from the database Your roster awaits Add your first athlete to start building your women\'s football empire Breaking barriers, building legacies Every champion was once a contender who refused to give up The future of football is here
Rising stars start here ⚡ Prospects Represented Available Inquiries Expiring Prospects Watchlist Connections Academy Inquiries Goals & Tasks Rising Star HQ My Prospects Prospects Represented Available Expiring Completed Upcoming Goals View All Activity Feed No recent activity — go scout tomorrow\'s stars! ⚡ Became Free Agent New Free Agent (Released) Prospect Added Prospect Removed Prospect Offered Added to Watchlist Removed from Watchlist Released from %1$s Moved from %1$s to %2$s Added by %1$s Removed by %1$s Removed by %1$s Offered to %1$s Offered by %1$s This prospect was removed from the database Your academy roster awaits Add your first prospect to start building the next generation Every legend was once a kid with a dream The future belongs to those who prepare for it today Tomorrow\'s superstars are on today\'s pitch
Your dashboard at a glance: players, tasks, alerts Tap to open Just now Updated %dm ago Updated %dh ago Updated %dd ago Tasks Players Add Player Refresh Upcoming: Stats Tasks No upcoming tasks %d pending %d overdue Attention Needed No alerts — all good Recent Activity No recent activity for your players No players assigned yet Players assigned to you will appear here
Team Overview %d agents
Agent Overview %d players managed Mandate Expiring Notes
Agent Tasks %1$d of %2$d tasks done No tasks yet No tasks yet. Tap + to add one. Add Task New Task for %s Task description… Select due date
Tasks Tasks Overview Due Today Overdue Total View All Tasks All Today This Week Overdue By Agent Timeline Today Tomorrow This Week Later No Due Date Completed No tasks yet Tap + to create your first task %1$d/%2$d completed New Task What needs to be done? Assign to Priority Low Medium High Add notes (optional) Create Task Task Details Mark Complete Mark Incomplete Delete Task Are you sure you want to delete this task? Task deleted Undo Task completed Save
%dd overdue Yesterday Today Tomorrow In %dd
Open Transfer Windows %d days left Open No open transfer windows at the moment. %d closing soon Priority Markets Europe (UEFA) South America (CONMEBOL) North & Central America (CONCACAF) Asia (AFC) Africa (CAF) Oceania (OFC)
Document Reminders %s missing %1$s expires in %2$dd
Cancel OK Expand Collapse Delete task Notifications
Change Language The app language will change to %s. The app will restart to apply the change. English עברית Confirm Change language
Releases Latest free agents from Transfermarkt Transfermarkt is down\nTry again later Shortlisted Visible All %d Add to agency Released Released on %1$s Loan Return Returned on %1$s Returned to %1$s %d roster teammate %d roster teammates No roster players played with this player Loading teammates… %d games together games together Roster teammates In shortlist Add to shortlist
Returnees Players returning from loan across European leagues No returnees found Loading (%1$d/%2$d leagues)…+ Leagues All %d
Requests Player requests from clubs by position Add request Share requests Positions 1 club %d clubs %d matching player %d matching players Find players Players for this request Find players using AI Scout Players from the market AI Scout searching… No matching players found online Match: %d%% Why this match? Club fit Budget realism Note fit Show different players %d players found No roster players match this request No requests yet Add requests from clubs when they ask for players. Tap + to add your first request. Delete request Delete request for %1$s (%2$s)? Add Request Edit Request Search club on Transfermarkt, then select position CLUB Search club… POSITION CONTACT AGE Min Max Age: Any Age: %1$d-%2$d Salary: %s Fee: %s Via %1$s • %2$s Direct request • %s Via Direct Additional notes… Notes WhatsApp Edit Delete Change CONTACT (optional) No contacts for this club Doesn\'t matter SALARY RANGE TRANSFER FEE NOTES (optional) Save Request Free/Free loan Lower than 200 DOMINANT FOOT Left Right Doesn\'t matter Foot: %s
Record request Speak the club, position, salary, transfer fee, foot, age Recording… Stop Tap to stop Analyzing your request Extracting club, position, requirements Could not analyze recording. Try again. Could not detect club or position. Please try again or fill manually. Fill manually or
Step %1$d of 4 Club Position Requirements Notes Next Search for club
Worldwide Contacts Club contacts for player recruitment Countries Add contact Clear search Clear Edit Delete Delete contact Delete %s? this contact Close More options No contacts yet Add club contacts for player recruitment. Pick from your phone or add manually. Add contact Edit contact Add Save WHO Import from phone contacts Could not read contact. Try granting contacts permission. This contact has no phone number. Select one with a number. Contacts permission needed to import or enter manually ROLE CLUB Name Contact name Phone Contact number (including phone code) No contacts found Try a different search or add a new contact
Step %1$d of %2$d Club Contact Role Next How do you want to add the contact? What is their role? (optional) Search for club Import from your phone contacts. We\'ll search the web to find their club and role, then link to Transfermarkt. Club & role Searching web for club and role… Found on Transfermarkt Search club manually Not the right club? Try again A contact with this phone number already exists — or enter manually — Change
Other Coach Asst Coach Sport Dir Board CEO President Scout / Analyst Agent Intermediary Agency Dir
Club Agency What type of contact? Club contact Coaches, scouts, sport directors at clubs Agency contact Agents, intermediaries at agencies Type Agency Enter agency name Import from your phone contacts. We\'ll search the web to find their agency and link it to Transfermarkt. Agency Contact info Searching web for agency… Found on Transfermarkt Not the right agency? Search manually Enter agency name to search Transfermarkt Agency Agency name Country (optional) e.g. USA, Germany No club contacts yet Add coaches, scouts and club staff for player recruitment. No agency contacts yet Add agents and intermediaries from player agencies. Add club contact Add agency contact Without agency Without club Search by name Search by name or agency Open Transfermarkt %d players No players under this agency
Add Player Contact Save Player Add to shortlist Add Player Search Transfermarkt to add to roster Search Transfermarkt to add to shortlist Search SoccerDonna to add to shortlist Search player to add to shortlist Add player from link Add to roster (with contact info) Add to shortlist Search for a player to add Type a name to find players on Transfermarkt Player Number Agent Number Tap to select Player is already in your shortlist Player is already in roster
Player Info View and manage player details Refresh Refresh from Transfermarkt Share Could not create share link. Please try again. Share in Choose the language for the shared page עברית English Generate mandate
Generate Mandate Expiry date Select expiry date Valid leagues / countries Search country… Entire country (all clubs) Generate Mandate Generating… OK Cancel Preview Mandate Page %d Done Failed to generate PDF: %1$s No agents with FIFA license found Next Remove
Step %1$d of 3 Agent Validity Review Select Agent Who will represent this player? Validity Details Set the mandate duration and where it applies Review & Generate Confirm all details before generating the mandate FIFA License: %1$s Tap to change Add Country / League No leagues added yet.\nTap the button above to add countries or clubs. Select an agent to continue Set an expiry date and add at least one league Select an expiry date to continue Add at least one league or country
Player Agent Validity FIFA License ID
Search for a country Search clubs in %1$s… %d club(s) selected Add to Mandate Delete Are you sure you want to delete this player? Are you sure you want to delete this note? Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? Contact Info Player Phone Agent Phone TM Profile TM WA Passport Details There is already a passport for this player First name Last name Passport number Date of birth Documents Uploading document… No documents yet Add passport, mandate, medical or other docs Add document Notes Add note Player-related tasks Add task No tasks for this player yet Choose template (recommended) Created by Linked player Add a new note… Save Note No notes yet Add your first note about this player View all %1$d notes All Notes Copy Record note Listening… Microphone permission needed to record notes Voice input not available on this device Stop recording Note deleted Undo Back Previously: %1$s (%2$s) Added by — %s Contract %s Mandate Mandate expires %s WhatsApp General Info Height Age Positions Nationality Foot Right Left Both Agency Contract Expiry Date Current Club Market Value Updating… Player Player Agent SD FMI Message on WhatsApp Edit Number Remove Number Remove agency Add Number Add Contract Expired Expired Expires in %d mo Without club Unknown Player data not available Current Club: %s Share with Synced %dm ago Synced %dh ago Synced %dd ago Synced %s yrs Salary & Transfer Fee Tap to set for request matching Set match criteria Remove salary & transfer fee
Highlights AI Scout Hidden gem potential Check hidden gem potential %d/100 Refresh Find similar players Create scout report for %s Generating scout report… Generating diamond score… Could not generate scout report. Please try again. No similar players found Options Refresh
Playing style Market value Position All-round Age ±2 yrs Age ±5 yrs Any age Exclude same club Exclude same league
Executive summary Full tactical Transfer focus Youth potential
Matching Requests No matching requests Clubs with requests matching this player will appear here Mark as offered Offered Offered: %1$s by %1$s Club feedback Add feedback Edit feedback Add club feedback Edit club feedback Offer date Club feedback (optional) e.g. Interested, will discuss with coach… Cancel
Proposal History Request deleted Fulfilled Active Previously offered Club feedback No feedback recorded by %1$s Show all (%1$d) Show less just now %1$d min ago %1$d hours ago %1$d days ago %1$d months ago
Find videos Refresh Try again No highlights yet Search for highlight of %1$s (last 2 years) %1$d videos Open %1$s on %2$s
Go back Market value trending up Market value trending down Edit salary and transfer fee Open link Delete document Edit phone number Clear phone number Delete note Expand Collapse
No players found in this league
Try adjusting your filters or search query
AI Scout War Room AI Scout AI Scout Search Describe the player you\'re looking for in natural language. Our AI will search across databases to find the best matches. e.g. Left winger under 23, fast, good dribbler… Search Try an example: Young CF from Balkans under €1M Creative AM, Scandinavian, U23 Left-footed CB, free agent Fast winger for Ligat Ha\'Al AI-Powered Scouting Natural language search across Transfermarkt + FM data AI interpretation Showing %1$d results Load All Results Search Again No players found. Try a different search. Please enter a search query League: %1$s FM %1$s FM Stats Real Stats 🔍 AI Scout 🧠 Find The Next Find Me The Next… Find young, affordable players showing early statistical signs of star potential Reference player name e.g. Mohamed Salah Max age: %d Max market value No limit Find The Next Found %1$d young players (from %2$d candidates) No young players found matching this profile. Try increasing the age or value cap.
War Room Discovery Agents AI Scout Player Discovery AI-discovered candidates from your requests, hidden gems, and agent picks. Refresh All Request Match Hidden Gems Report View report Generating report… SYNTHESIS STATS AGENT MARKET AGENT TACTICS AGENT Shortlist View Full Report → Scout Agent Network AI agents continuously monitoring leagues and players based on your criteria. profiles %1$d players Updated %1$s Matches %1$s Hidden Gem Agent Pick Discovery All Agents Scouting Report Generating Full Report… AI agents are analyzing the player Full Scouting Report View on Transfermarkt RECOMMENDATION CONFIDENCE Risks Opportunities Key Stats Comparable Players Best Formations
